query: NCCN guideline cervical cancer brachytherapy latest version

results.title: NCCN Guidelines® Insights: Head and Neck Cancers, Version 2.2025.
results.snippet:
PubMed ID: 39938471. 2025/02/01 00:00. BACKGROUND: The National Comprehensive Cancer Care Network (NCCN) provides 
recommendations for patients with colorectal cancer. Concordance with 
evidence-based guidelines improves outcomes. Our objectives were to 1) examine 
rates of guideline non-concordance in a large vertically integrated health 
system; 2) examine factors associated with non-concordant care, and 3) identify 
geographical patterns of non-concordant care.
METHODS: Colorectal cancer pati
